templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is through this link: https://larroude.com/pages/become-a-wholesaler Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Order status/order tracking
templates.content: You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://gruntstyle.attn.tv/aMVa8HyjtvUx

templates.name: Product suggestion (Don't ESC after)
templates.content: We would be more than happy to send your suggestion along to our design and development team. We cannot guarantee that they will choose to go the route of those designs, but it's always worth a shot. If there is anything else we can assist with for the time being, please do not hesitate to reach back out.

templates.name: What does the reserve membership include?
templates.content:
This membership is $4.95 each month, and consists of the following perks: 

- Free expedited shipping on all online orders
- 10% off all online and in-store purchases
- Access to club exclusive products in the Club Store
- Discounts at our favorite businesses partners
- Automatically entered into a monthly Giveaway
- Early access to Grunt Style content, sales and promotions

templates.name: I don't like the subscription shirt that I received (club membership)
templates.content:
We do apologize that this month's shirt design is not something that you would see yourself wearing. Due to a large number of customers with our Club Membership, we aren't always able to appeal to the eye of everyone with the design. That being said Club Grunt Style does listen and take into consideration the opinions of our Club members. I'll pass your feedback on the design up
our chain of command.

If you are interested, we do have a lifetime warranty on all of our products, so you are welcome to send that shirt back to us. All of the information on that can be found here: https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/beerguarantee

If there is anything else we can assist with in the meantime, please do not hesitate to reach back out.

templates.name: If I use AfterPay will I have to pay the first payment at the time of purchase?
templates.content:
When using AfterPay, all customers are required to make their first payment at the time of purchase. The remaining three payments are then deducted automatically every two weeks from your chosen payment method.

If you choose to make additional payments before your scheduled pay dates, you may do so through your Afterpay account. You can log in to your Afterpay account to view your payment schedule and make a payment before the due date if you choose to do so: https://www.afterpay.com/index

templates.name: I have a custom order, can I still do a Beer Guarantee?
templates.content: Custom items are eligible for the standard Beer Guarantee on an individual consumer basis. For overall custom orders, no refunds will be provided if the order was delivered as described in the custom order agreement.

templates.name: Do you offer a return label for my Beer Guarantee?
templates.content:
We do offer Return Labels as a courtesy to all of our customers for purchase. It is $9.95 plus any applicable tax. This covers up to 10 pounds (anything over 10 pounds would be an additional $9.95). If you are interested in purchasing a $9.95 prepaid UPS label from us instead of acquiring one on your own, please email us at customerservice@gruntstyle.com with the following information: 

Name on Account
Email address associated with the account
Order Number
Items sending back
Shipping address

templates.name: How does the 3 month prepaid membership work?
templates.content: The 3-Month Prepaid membership is one upfront charge of $59 that will auto-generate one monthly custom-designed shirt each month for three months. This will automatically renew every three months unless requested otherwise. You save 11% by signing up this way!

templates.name: What should I do if my package says delivered but I don't have it?
templates.content:
I apologize! If this were my package, I would be frustrated too.

Unfortunately, we're seeing a lot of these issues. What we're finding is that when the carrier receives the package they will automatically mark them as delivered. Then within 3-5 business days, they just appear at your door. We're forced to wait at least 5 business days (not counting weekends or holidays). After 5 business
days, if it does not show up please reach out to us, and we will make it right.

templates.name: How does the 6 month prepaid membership work?
templates.content: The 6-Month Prepaid membership is one upfront charge of $112 that will auto-generate one monthly custom-designed shirt each month for six months. This will automatically renew every six months unless requested otherwise. You save 15% by signing up this way!

templates.name: The item I want to exchange/beer guarantee it, is no longer available/it's discontinued on the website?
templates.content: If the requested item(s) has been discontinued and no longer on our website we will not be able to complete your request. We are still able to swap your products out for other items of comparable value, or we can issue you a gift card, please reach out directly to our Beer Guarantee Team at customerservice@gruntstyle.com.

templates.name: How long does it take to process my Beer Guarantee?
templates.content: Once we receive your package, you should hear from our Beer Guarantee team via email within one work week (excluding weekends) to begin your process. Please note that timelines may vary during holiday seasons.

templates.name: How does the monthly membership work?
templates.content:
After your initial sign-up charge, your membership will be $22 a month. Whether
you're a Men's 4XL or a Women's Small, the price stays the same! The membership will continue to renew each month until you decide you've had enough monthly doses of freedom. (As if that's possible!)

templates.name: How does the Annual prepaid membership work?
templates.content: The Annual Prepaid membership is one upfront charge of $211 that will auto-generate one monthly custom-designed shirt each month for 12 months. This will automatically renew every year unless requested otherwise. You save 20% by signing up this way!

templates.name: How do I start a return?
templates.content: Please print out our Beer Guarantee form on the following link and follow the steps: https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/beerGuarantee

templates.name: I bought my item from a 3rd party, can I still do a Beer Guarantee?
templates.content: As long as the 3rd party is one that is "Authorized by Grunt Style" we can still process the Beer Guarantee.

templates.name: Can I return/exchange my item even if I’ve already used/washed/damaged it?
templates.content: Yes, you can send back items at any time for a store credit or swap regardless of the condition under our Beer Guarantee.

templates.name: My shirt was lost/stolen can I still Beer Guarantee it?
templates.content: Unfortunately no, we still need the item sent back to us to honour the Beer Guarantee.

templates.name: Do you ship to APO, FPO or DPO addresses?
templates.content: Yes, we do! You can check out the shipping information here: https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/shipping-handling

templates.name: What is the difference between the monthly and annual membership?
templates.content: A Monthly member will be charged on the 1st of every month for the length of their membership, while Annual members pay in full for the whole year.

templates.name: Why are the flags backward?
templates.content: The flag is not actually backward but it is assaulting forward. It symbolizes carrying the flag into battle. This was traditionally done by a single person carrying the flag on a pole, and while running toward the enemy, the flag will trail behind. The flag is shown on military uniforms on the right arm, with the stars facing the enemy (indicating going towards, not running away), as if it were still on the flagpole from tradition.

templates.name: Donation request
templates.content:
The best way to request or inquire about a potential donation from Grunt Style is to contact us here:
https://www.gruntstylefoundation.org/contact

Please be aware that our Customer Service team, unfortunately, does not have access to any pending requests. We cannot guarantee any collaborations, but it is definitely the best avenue to take. We wish you the best of luck in your mission!

templates.name: Payment methods / financing
templates.content: We accept all major credit cards, ShopPay, PayPal, Amazon Pay, and Afterpay (if you wish to pay in installments).

templates.name: Will I be able to see what the newest shirt looks like before I receive it?
templates.content: As the shirts are an exclusive item available only to club members, we don't release images of the shirt before it ships. We can assure you that our highly talented staff of U.S. Combat Veteran graphic designers will create a unique shirt that you won't find anywhere else!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/gruntstyle/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/gruntstyle/

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find our retail locations here: https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/contact-grunt-style

templates.name: Customer Service
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at customerservice@gruntstyle.com or give us a call at 1877-55-GRUNT (1-877-554-7868). Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Can I use a coupon on a Preorder?
templates.content: Unfortunately, while the product is still on preorder no discounts will be provided.

templates.name: Warranty policy/Beer guarantee
templates.content: You can take a look at our Beer Guarantee here: https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/beerguarantee

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1877-55-GRUNT (1-877-554-7868) Monday-Friday 9am-5pm CT, or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: Some shirts are 100% made in America, and all use 100% American-grown cotton. Some shirts are assembled outside of the U.S. to keep costs down (they're assembled in the Americas). All are designed, printed, packaged and shipped from our Chicagoland headquarters by veterans and patriots.

templates.name: Size chart
templates.content: Happy to help you find the right size! You can check out our size chart here: https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/sizechart If you're still unsure, just let me know!

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a loyalty program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/loyalty-rewards

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content:
We will accept your return of unworn, unwashed, like new condition, and defective merchandise by mail for a full refund of the purchase price (excluding shipping costs) if the merchandise is returned within 60 days of receipt. 

Any other return/exchange will fall under our Beer Guarantee policy for merchandise credit or swap, which you can check out here: https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/beerGuarantee

templates.name: No promotions available
templates.content: I don't have any codes available at the moment, but our deals will always be shared with our SMS subscribers or on our website, so keep an eye out! In the meantime, you can check out our sales collection here: https://gruntstyle.attn.tv/sl/fNmnVrm7

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We do offer free standard shipping on orders over $75 for all customers. While for logged-in Club Grunt Style members free expedited shipping and handling is valid on all orders.

templates.name: How to enter monthly giveaways?
templates.content: No need to enter the giveaways! All active club members are automatically entered into every giveaway.

templates.name: Why does my order say its unfulfilled when I log into my account?
templates.content: With Club Grunt Style, you pay a month in advance which means you'll always have one order on your account showing up as 'unfulfilled'. At times, our systems may have a hiccup with the communication between our processing system and shipping system. We're working on a solution for this issue. If you notice anything abnormal, please reach out  so I can check for you.

templates.name: How can I leave a review?
templates.content: You should receive a follow-up email about 2 weeks after you've placed the order that will allow you to leave a review for the item you received.

templates.name: Military/Veteran/First Responders Discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service!  We have a program that allows military members, veterans, and first responders the opportunity to purchase select Grunt Style products with special pricing. Check it here: https://gruntstyle.attn.tv/sl/oC2_0E0f

templates.name: When will my first shirt arrive? (club membership)
templates.content: The initial order will not ship until the beginning of the next month. Our club shirts are paid in advance, which allows us to ensure that we have every club member covered every month.

templates.name: How much is the subscription for Club Grunt Stlye?
templates.content: The sign up is $22 a month which is billed monthly. You can also check out our pricing structure here: https://prnt.sc/qftvKLphNb32 or visit this page for more info: https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/join-now

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time takes 3 business days and we usually ship via UPS or USPS. Once shipped, it will take 3-6 business days domestically and 10-31 business days internationally.

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Unfortunately, we're unable to add items to an existing order. I can check if a cancellation is possible. What's the order number and email address that it's under?

templates.name: Custom order
templates.content: The best way to request or inquire about custom designs with us is by filling out the form at this link: https://gruntstyle.attn.tv/sl/Jlftwz9m

templates.name: Damages / defects
templates.content: I'm sorry to hear that! Please email us directly at sms@gruntstyle.com with a picture of the defect and someone from the team will take care of you.

templates.name: How to Redeem Points
templates.content: Redeeming your points is easy! Just click "Redeem My Points" here: https://gruntstyle.attn.tv/sl/Ibz1lK8j then copy and paste your code at checkout!

templates.name: Restock? (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend checking our website and social media frequently.

templates.content:
If you're interested in working with us to be a content creator, ambassador, influencer, or
affiliate(sponsorship), please fill out this form: https://www.wrike.com/frontend/requestforms/index.html?token=eyJhY2NvdW50SWQiOjI4MzI2MiwidGFza0Zvcm1JZCI6ODkyMTAzfQk0ODM0ODI1NjUwMzI2CTQzZjk3ZTViNWQ0ZDgzMjVlNmYyZTBmNGEyNTgyNWNlZDhkZGYwMGRmZjhkZDg1OTdiZDgxZDMxNDBiMzMxZDg=

Please be aware that our Customer Service team, unfortunately, does not have access to any pending requests. We cannot guarantee any collaborations, but it is definitely the best avenue to take!

templates.name: Wholesale/dealer inquiries
templates.content: If you would like to become an authorized retailer of our GS products please fill out our online application here: https://www.gsretailer.com/account/login?checkout_url=https://www.gsretailer.com

templates.name: Code won't work - Brand Specific
templates.content: Orders containing a club subscription, sale items, custom orders, select outwear, shoes, EDC bags, pet gear, mystery shirts, preorder items and licensed items such as marines, navy, army, air force, space force, and RealTree do not work with discount codes.

templates.name: If I place an order that contains a pre order item, will the rest of my things ship separately?
templates.content: If a pre-order is within an order, it will hold the shipment of all other items until that specified release date. We do apologize for any confusion with this and want to thank you for your continued patience and patronage!

templates.name: Price adjustment
templates.content: We do offer price adjustments for orders placed within 7 days.

templates.name: Can I use a military discount and points at the same time?
templates.content: I'm afraid you won't be able to use multiple deals at checkout but feel free to use the one that has better value for you.

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://www.gruntstyle.com/pages/sizechart

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://www.gruntstyle.com/collections/sale
